gemini-F001.note: Valid: pipefail missing from docker compose|tee pipeline. Remediation REJECTED: || true would conceal failures, not fix them.

codex-F001.note: Valid: pipefail missing (overlaps gemini-F001). Remediation PASS: set -o pipefail is exactly correct.

codex-F002.note: Valid: ARG PNPM_VERSION has no default. Remediation PASS: ARG PNPM_VERSION=10.25.0 default is correct.

opus-F001.note: Valid: root Dockerfile hardcodes pnpm@10.25.0 with no version-drift guard. Cross-file comment exists but no automated check. Remediation PASS: ARG PNPM_VERSION + variable reference is correct.

opus-F002.note: Duplicate of codex-F002 (ARG PNPM_VERSION no default). Concurrent but not unique — steal, 0 points.

opus-F003.note: Valid: remote-hive-build.yml missing trailing newline (POSIX). Remediation PASS: trivial fix.

opus-F004.note: EXCLUDED: debug 4.4.3→4.4.1 is transitive-side-effect of pnpm install during merge conflict resolution, not related to our Dockerfile/Node/pnpm changes.

opus-F005.note: REJECTED: [ "$MAJOR" -ge 22 ] is intentional FLOOR — the whole fix tightens engines.node to >=22.13, so enforcing >=22 is correct. Not a bug.
